title: Opportunities of OO and $p$O collisions at the LHC
author_string: Jasmine Brewer, Aleksas Mazeliauskas, Wilke van der Schee
abstract: This is the summary document of the virtual workshop "Opportunities of OO and $p$O collisions at the LHC", which took place Feb 4-10, 2021. We briefly review the presented perspectives on the physics opportunities of oxygen--oxygen and proton--oxygen collisions. The full workshop program and the recordings are available at cern.ch/OppOatLHC.
